role: Lead Analytics Engineer  job in London | Wise

evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: spending significant time mentoring them directly to establish best practices around infrastructure, monitoring, testing, and data modelling
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD names testing, monitoring, and best-practice governance alongside a strong "build better products, faster" mission framing in roughly equal measure, landing on mixed.
evidence.domain_risk: Wise is a global technology company, building the best way to move and manage the world's money.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Wise is a regulated international money-transfer and banking platform, but the JD frames the Analytics Engineering role around internal BI tooling and mentoring rather than explicit regulatory/compliance duties for the role itself, so moderate applies.
evidence.jd_authorship: You will work closely with Analysts within one of Wise's squads... Become the go-to expert for new tooling like dbt & AI applications, leading its adoption and successful rollout across the organization.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The JD gives specific detail about scale (130+ Analysts, 2,500 weekly BI tool users), squad/tribe structure, and named tools (dbt, Airflow, Looker/Superset) reflecting genuine hiring-manager knowledge of the role.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: You'll be crucial in ensuring it's easy to find the right data quickly... You're able to build strong empathy for your stakeholders and internal customers
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role serves internal Analysts and BI tool users across the organization, an internal_data orientation toward the data/analytics function's own consumers rather than an external commercial, product, or finance group.
evidence.autonomy_level: Strategic Roadmap: You will take ownership of defining and driving the data infrastructure roadmap for your assigned tribe, ensuring strategic alignment and efficient execution.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: As a Lead, the candidate explicitly owns and drives the data infrastructure roadmap and strategic alignment for their tribe, a clear direction-setting mandate rather than delivering scoped work defined by others.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: You will play a key role in building and maintaining core datasets, ensuring data quality and accessibility.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role builds and maintains core datasets and drives adoption of new tooling within an already large, established Analytics Engineering function, an extend/fix framing rather than starting from scratch.
evidence.data_team_maturity: At Wise, we have over 130 Analysts and more than 2,500 weekly active users of our Business Intelligence Tools.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The JD describes a large-scale, well-established analytics function (130+ analysts, thousands of BI users, defined career levelling/tribe structure) with named specialized roles, indicating a mature data organisation.
evidence.ai_role: Become the go-to expert for new tooling like dbt & AI applications, leading its adoption and successful rollout across the organization.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Candidate champions org-wide adoption of AI tooling/infrastructure rather than personally using AI to code faster.
evidence.testing_framing: spending significant time mentoring them directly to establish best practices around infrastructure, monitoring, testing, and data modelling
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing is named among practices the candidate owns and drives as a lead, not just a listed tool.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: JD is framed around mission, velocity, and mentoring with no risk or compliance register.
